name: MikroTik SXT LTE7 kit
title: MikroTik SXT LTE7 kit
short_description: Outdoor LTE CPE with R11e-LTE7 modem, LTE Cat7 (300Mbps/100Mbps), 2x 100Mbps Ethernet (1x PoE-in, 1x PoE-out up to 57V), QCA9531 CPU 650MHz, 64MB RAM, 16MB Flash, RouterOS L3. Features wideband LTE support (FDD: 1,3,5,7,8,20,28,32; TDD:38,40,41), 2x2 MIMO, weatherproof enclosure, wide temp range (-40°C to +60°C), pole mount included.
description: The MikroTik SXT LTE7 kit is a rugged outdoor LTE CPE designed to deliver dependable broadband connectivity in remote or low-signal areas. Equipped with the new R11e-LTE7 modem, it supports LTE Category 7 with download speeds up to 300 Mbps and upload speeds up to 100 Mbps, ensuring consistent performance where mobile phones or consumer hotspots struggle. The device operates across a wide selection of LTE FDD bands (1, 3, 5, 7, 8, 20, 28, 32) and LTE TDD bands (38, 40, 41), making it compatible with major network operators worldwide. Its 2×2 MIMO downlink and 1×1 MIMO uplink configuration improves throughput and uplink stability in both urban and rural deployments. Designed for outdoor installation, the SXT LTE7 kit provides reliable connectivity for homes, farms, industrial systems, or off-grid properties that require stable, high-speed Internet access in challenging environments.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable LTE Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik SXT LTE7 kit is a rugged outdoor LTE CPE designed to deliver dependable broadband connectivity in remote or low-signal areas. Equipped with the new R11e-LTE7 modem, it supports LTE Category 7 with download speeds up to 300 Mbps and upload speeds up to 100 Mbps, ensuring consistent performance where mobile phones or consumer hotspots struggle. The device operates across a wide selection of LTE FDD bands (1, 3, 5, 7, 8, 20, 28, 32) and LTE TDD bands (38, 40, 41), making it compatible with major network operators worldwide. Its 2×2 MIMO downlink and 1×1 MIMO uplink configuration improves throughput and uplink stability in both urban and rural deployments. Designed for outdoor installation, the SXT LTE7 kit provides reliable connectivity for homes, farms, industrial systems, or off-grid properties that require stable, high-speed Internet access in challenging environments.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Hardware Design
detailed_description.text: Built around the QCA9531 650 MHz CPU with 64 MB RAM and 16 MB Flash storage, the SXT LTE7 kit combines efficiency with proven MikroTik reliability. It includes two Fast Ethernet ports, one of which supports 802.3af/at PoE-in for flexible powering options, while the second port provides passive PoE-out (up to 57 V) for powering companion devices such as another router or camera. The device operates across a wide 12–57 V input range, offering remarkable deployment flexibility in remote areas. It features a robust weatherproof enclosure, engineered to withstand temperatures from –40 °C to +60 °C, ensuring long-term operation in demanding outdoor conditions. The maximum power consumption is only 7 W (24 W with attachments), enabling efficient energy usage even with PoE peripherals. The included mounting bracket, metal ring, and thermal pad simplify installation on masts or poles, allowing for optimal LTE signal alignment and stable long-distance connectivity.

detailed_description.heading: RouterOS v7 Control
detailed_description.text: The SXT LTE7 kit operates on RouterOS v7 License Level 3, MikroTik’s professional network operating system that provides advanced routing, firewall, and management capabilities. Users can configure VPN tunnels, NAT, DHCP, traffic shaping, and VLAN segmentation, all within a secure and highly customizable environment. RouterOS v7 offers flexible remote management via web interface, WinBox, or CLI, allowing both advanced administrators and everyday users to maintain full control over their connection. The integration of RouterOS ensures robust monitoring, real-time traffic analysis, and automated backup options, which are essential for reliable off-site deployments. Thanks to this combination of industrial-grade hardware and powerful software, the SXT LTE7 kit delivers enterprise-class performance in a compact outdoor form factor. It is an ideal solution for rural broadband, backup Internet links, remote security systems, or any application that demands stable and secure LTE-based connectivity.
